object_type: bounded target for a DFM-MKC/SIDFH phase-front charge candidate

definition.dark_front: dark_front(t) := boundary of Sigma_t \ (J^+(S) cap Sigma_t)

repo_evidence_inputs: DFM-MKC V1 already contains periodic structural phase theta : M -> R / 2pi Z.
DFM-MKC V1 already contains phase current J_theta^mu = beta phi^2 nabla^mu theta.
DFM-MKC V1 already contains phase-current conservation nabla_mu J_theta^mu = 0.
guardrails: Does not claim PhaseFrontCharge is independent.
Only records a candidate nonmetric DFM-MKC/SIDFH interface object.

reduction_test.question: Is PhaseFrontCharge fixed by g, T_DFM_MKC, and standard null-cone geometry?
reduction_test.nonreduction_outcome: If not fixed, isolate first candidate nonmetric SIDFH residual.

next_admissible_step: Prove or disprove that PhaseFrontCharge is uniquely determined by Lorentzian metric, stress-energy, and standard null-cone geometry.
